name: @migration-utility/evals
description: Promptfoo eval harness for skill testing

scripts.eval: npm run eval:profiling-table && npm run eval:generating-model && npm run eval:generating-tests && npm run eval:reviewing-tests && npm run eval:reviewing-model && npm run eval:analyzing-table && npm run eval:refactoring-sql && npm run eval:cmd-scope && npm run eval:cmd-profile && npm run eval:cmd-generate-model && npm run eval:cmd-generate-tests && npm run eval:cmd-refactor && npm run eval:cmd-status && npm run eval:cmd-commit-push-pr
scripts.eval:profiling-table: git checkout -- fixtures/ && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/profiling-table/skill-profiling-table.yaml; git checkout -- fixtures/ && git clean -fd fixtures/
scripts.eval:generating-model: git checkout -- fixtures/ && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/generating-model/skill-generating-model.yaml; git checkout -- fixtures/ && git clean -fd fixtures/
scripts.eval:generating-tests: git checkout -- fixtures/ && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/generating-tests/skill-generating-tests.yaml; git checkout -- fixtures/ && git clean -fd fixtures/
scripts.eval:reviewing-tests: git checkout -- fixtures/ && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/reviewing-tests/skill-reviewing-tests.yaml; git checkout -- fixtures/ && git clean -fd fixtures/
scripts.eval:reviewing-model: git checkout -- fixtures/ && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/reviewing-model/skill-reviewing-model.yaml; git checkout -- fixtures/ && git clean -fd fixtures/
scripts.eval:analyzing-table: git checkout -- fixtures/ && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/analyzing-table/skill-analyzing-table.yaml; git checkout -- fixtures/ && git clean -fd fixtures/
scripts.eval:cmd-scope: git checkout -- fixtures/ && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/cmd-scope/cmd-scope.yaml; git checkout -- fixtures/ && git clean -fd fixtures/
scripts.eval:cmd-profile: git checkout -- fixtures/ && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/cmd-profile/cmd-profile.yaml; git checkout -- fixtures/ && git clean -fd fixtures/
scripts.eval:cmd-generate-model: git checkout -- fixtures/ && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/cmd-generate-model/cmd-generate-model.yaml; git checkout -- fixtures/ && git clean -fd fixtures/
scripts.eval:cmd-generate-tests: git checkout -- fixtures/ && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/cmd-generate-tests/cmd-generate-tests.yaml; git checkout -- fixtures/ && git clean -fd fixtures/
scripts.eval:cmd-status: git checkout -- fixtures/ && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/cmd-status/cmd-status.yaml; git checkout -- fixtures/ && git clean -fd fixtures/
scripts.eval:refactoring-sql: git checkout -- fixtures/ && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/refactoring-sql/skill-refactoring-sql.yaml; git checkout -- fixtures/ && git clean -fd fixtures/
scripts.eval:cmd-refactor: git checkout -- fixtures/ && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/cmd-refactor/cmd-refactor.yaml; git checkout -- fixtures/ && git clean -fd fixtures/
scripts.postrestore:oracle-regression: git checkout -- oracle-regression/fixtures/ && git clean -fd oracle-regression/fixtures/
scripts.eval:oracle-regression: npm run prerestore:oracle-regression && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c oracle-regression/promptfooconfig.yaml; npm run postrestore:oracle-regression
scripts.eval:oracle-live: npm run prerestore:oracle-live && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c oracle-live/promptfooconfig.yaml; npm run postrestore:oracle-live
scripts.eval:mssql-live: npm run prerestore:mssql-live && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c mssql-live/promptfooconfig.yaml; npm run postrestore:mssql-live
